prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOSKWEW25IB-MED-BLCK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Survival Knife with Emergency Whistle 2.5 Inch Blade Description: The ASR Outdoor Tanto Blade Neck Knife is a great tool to have while boating, fishing, camping, hiking as part of your survival and emergency kits. Protect yourself in an emergency situation with the Survival Lanyard Blade and Whistle Tool.

It features a 2.5" blade that locks in place within the plastic hard sheath which features a built in rescue whistle for emergency situations. The whistle and knife combo comes in a traditional classic black color. This is a great two in one emergency tool and perfect for campers and hikers.

Don't get caught in an outdoor emergency without one of these survival blades. Search Terms: fixed blade knives fixed blade camp knife fixed blade fixed blade knives self defense knives camping gear emergency tools outdoors camping hiking survival emergency knife knife dagger Features: - Survival Lanyard with Emergency Whistle and 2.5 Inch Black Tanto Blade Emergency Tool Ultimate Safety - Traditional Classic Black Color - Sheath Features Survival Whistle - 2.5" Blade; 7.5" Overall Length - Lanyard for Easy Transportation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 2.5 Inch Black Tanto Blade Survival Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 2.5in Black Tanto Survival Neck Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Emergency Whistle, Fixed Blade, Neck Knife, Survival Lanyard, Camping Hiking Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Built-In Rescue Whistle, Hard Sheath, Lanyard Carry, Fixed Blade, Camping Hiking Boating Emergency Tool
